item.title: Public Sector Careers Event | 30 September 2024
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description: Join us on September 30 from 9am to 5pm for an insightful and inspiring Public Sector Careers Event, where we unlock the door to a world of opportunities that serve the greater good. This full-day event is your gateway to discovering a fulfilling career where you can make a real difference in your community and […]
item.content:encoded:
Join us on September 30 from 9am to 5pm for an insightful and inspiring Public Sector Careers Event, where we unlock the door to a world of opportunities that serve the greater good. This full-day event is your gateway to discovering a fulfilling career where you can make a real difference in your community and beyond. Meet recruiters from diverse government agencies, attend workshops on skill development, and hear from accomplished professionals sharing their experiences. Whether you’re a recent graduate, mid-career changer, or simply exploring new horizons, this event has something for everyone. Don’t miss this chance to network, learn, and kickstart a career with purpose. Register now for free and embark on a journey towards making an impact!

Register to attend via Eventbrite. Places are limited so get in quick!
